title: Try Something New for 30 Days
preview: Is there something you've always meant to do, wanted to do, but just haven't? Matt Cutts suggests: Try it for 30 days.

title: How to Speak So That People Want to Listen
preview: Julian Treasure shares the 7 deadly sins of speaking and offers tools for powerful speech — rich with idioms and collocations.

title: Inside the Mind of a Master Procrastinator
preview: Tim Urban takes us deep inside the procrastinator's brain with humor and wit — loaded with informal English, metaphors, and phrasal verbs.

title: The Power of Believing You Can Improve
preview: Carol Dweck explores the growth mindset and the power of 'not yet' — great for academic and professional vocabulary.

title: How Great Leaders Inspire Action
preview: Simon Sinek explains the Golden Circle — packed with business English collocations and persuasive language patterns.

title: The Power of Vulnerability
preview: Brené Brown researches human connection, shame, and vulnerability — rich emotional vocabulary and conversational register.

title: Your Body Language May Shape Who You Are
preview: Amy Cuddy's science-backed talk about power poses — full of scientific register, hedging language, and grammar patterns.

title: The Danger of Silence
preview: Clint Smith reads four poems about the danger of silence — a powerful, short piece full of figurative language and emotional expression.
